evidenceBoundary: Planning is adopted. No persistent adversarial test, pre-fix RED from that test, production fix, post-fix result, scope completion, or certification is claimed.
nextRequiredAction: Create TP-BUG001-02 with the exact persistent title and record its pre-fix RED against unchanged options-flow-feed-lab.html before implementation dispatch.

scope.scopeName: Sequence Heavy Hydration After Shared Shell Readiness

tests.testId: SCN-012-028 and SCN-012-029 all 23 registry pages bootstrap one exact shell without script-order drift
tests.description: Run the unchanged all-23 command before and after repair; current bytes fail only options-flow at the existing 10-second selector and fixed bytes must pass all routes with zero skips.
tests.liveBoundary: local System Chrome application and same-origin static files

tests.testId: Regression: BUG-001 options flow shell is ready before heavy hydration begins
tests.description: A page.addInitScript native-fetch observer forwards every request unchanged and proves the first option delta request sees the ready shell; it performs no route interception and retains the existing 10-second shell deadline.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/tool-experience.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: BUG-001 options flow shell is ready before heavy hydration begins" --reporter=list
tests.liveBoundary: real local page and same-origin static server
tests.requestObservationMode: page.addInitScript wraps native fetch for observation and calls the original fetch unchanged

tests.description: Run complete ordinary, Center, and mobile shell regressions together with no request interception.
Prove provider/data ownership, option producer/snapshots, shared context modules, Scope 04, and parent coordination remain unchanged; classify every changed path.
Preserve all existing source, registry, shell, context, model, and tool invariants.
Reject skips, failure-condition returns, optional assertions, interception, timeout inflation, and ordering tests that do not fail on current production.

applicability.unit: broad selftest required; no new pure domain computation
applicability.functional: required for exact all-route reproduction and ownership boundaries
applicability.integration: not applicable: no Research Lab service tier changes
applicability.ui-unit: not applicable: no component framework owns the inline page boot
applicability.e2e-api: not applicable: no service API changes
applicability.e2e-ui: required for exact startup ordering and broader shell preservation
applicability.stress: not applicable: no new SLA or stress-sensitive algorithm
applicability.load: not applicable: row-capacity redesign is excluded

excluded: rlapp.js, rlviews.js, rlexperience.js, rlg.js, rlticker.js, rlcontext.js
timeout increases, route skips, worker/source changes, row truncation, and manual fetch controls

sequence.action: Create TP-BUG001-02 and record the persistent adversarial RED against unchanged production while retaining the exact all-23 RED.
Apply the page-local startup-sequencing repair only after the persistent RED is recorded.
Run exact after-fix, broader shell, ownership, quality, rollback, and broad regression rows.
Validate only after every required specialist and audit gate is satisfied.
